pr.title: Non Record: 0.1582 BPB — Learned Mixer Head + No TTT + Matrix LR 0.03

output.summary: Learned mixer head now trained with a higher matrix LR so it outperforms the prior PR without any TTT while staying within artifact/size limits.
techniques: Learned mixer head combining transformer states with frozen n-gram experts
Matrix LR increased to 0.03 via large-scale screening to strengthen mixing weights
TTT removed so eval uses a single-pass, training-only mixing strategy
